title: Enneads V.1: The Three Primal Hypostases
description: Plotinus on the One, Intellect, and Soul — the three levels of divine reality from which all things emanate.
introduction: Plotinus on the One, Intellect, and Soul — the three levels of divine reality from which all things emanate.

translation.text: The One is beyond being. From it proceeds Intellect, and from Intellect proceeds Soul.
